name: JJK Yakuza AU
description:
"I need a gangsta... to love me better..."

CW: Ryomen Sukuna, Toji is a worse father present than he was as absent, Yuji doesn't know what he's doing, Inumaki has PTSD-induced mutism, obviously criminal activity of all kinds, ranging from drug dealing to assassination. Everyone is an adult.

Everyone in the cover art is here; Choso Kamo, Nanami Kento, Toji Fushiguro, Ryomen Sukuna, Satoru Gojo, Suguru Geto, Yuji Itadori and Megumi Fushiguro. Updated to include Yuta Okkotsu and Toge Inumaki cause the shortage of them on this app leaves a void in my heart.

None of the arts belong to me, I just stapled them all into one.
creator: PrincessDulcinea
